info.name: Driver Network — Catalog Publish (BPP → CDS)
info.description:
## Driver Network — Catalog Publish (BPP → CDS)

**Purpose:** Publishes driver-domain catalogs to the Catalog Discovery Service (CDS) so they are indexed and discoverable by BAPs. This collection is a **prerequisite** for all transaction flow collections — run it before UC1-A, UC1-B, UC2-A, or UC2-B.

**Protocol:** Beckn v2.0.0 — catalog management flow
**Endpoint:**  (set  to the CDS sandbox URL)

### Quick-start
1. Import **DriverNetwork_Dev_Environment.json** and set .
2. Run folder 01 to publish job catalog (prerequisite for UC1).
3. Run folder 03 to publish candidate catalog (prerequisite for UC2).
4. Folders 02 and 04 simulate the async on_publish callbacks from CDS to BPP.

### Scenarios
- **Scenario 1 (folders 01–02):** Operator Platform publishes  resources. Used by UC1-A (BMTC Bus Driver) and UC1-B (Gig Delivery).
- **Scenario 2 (folders 03–04):** Driver/Aggregator Platform publishes  resources. Used by UC2-A (HMV Truck) and UC2-B (Auto-Rickshaw).

### PII note — Candidate Catalog
The candidate catalog payload (folder 03) is PII-safe:  absent,  absent,  anonymised. Consistent with UC2 on_discover payloads.

variable.description: Catalog Discovery Service endpoint — confirm with network team
Driver Platform BPP callback URL (for on_publish)

item.name: 01 — catalog/publish  [Job Catalog — Operator BPP → CDS]
item.description: Operator Platform (BPP) publishes driver-job resources to the CDS. Prerequisite for UC1-A and UC1-B transaction flows.

request.description: BPP → CDS: publish driver-job catalog. Must run before UC1 discover calls.

item.name: 02 — catalog/on_publish  [Job Catalog — CDS → Operator BPP]
item.description: CDS confirms job catalog indexed. Async callback to BPP callback URL.

request.description: CDS → BPP: ACK with resourceCount and indexedAt timestamp.

item.name: 03 — catalog/publish  [Candidate Catalog — Driver Platform BPP → CDS]
item.description: Driver/Aggregator Platform (BPP) publishes driver-candidate resources to the CDS. Prerequisite for UC2-A and UC2-B transaction flows. ★ PII AUDIT: candidate resourceAttributes contain no passport_reference, no home_location.gps, anonymised descriptor names.

request.description: BPP → CDS: publish driver-candidate catalog. Must run before UC2 discover calls.

item.name: 04 — catalog/on_publish  [Candidate Catalog — CDS → Driver Platform BPP]

request.description: CDS → BPP: ACK with resourceCount and indexedAt timestamp.
